Kaulin Teppanyaki

Kaulin Teppanyaki (Jianxing)

← Back to all restaurants
★★★★★ 4.5
📍 West District, Taichung📅 2026
Teppanyaki Taiwanese Steak Budget-Friendly
Kaulin Teppanyaki is a long-running, budget-friendly local favorite in Taichung. The Jianxing branch sits on Jianxing Rd. across from the Splendor Park boulevard, close to the Museum of Natural Science, and draws queues on weekdays and weekends alike. The draw is its "double-main set"—two main dishes at a wallet-friendly price, served with corn soup, rice, stir-fried vegetables, bean sprouts, and a dessert. Cooked to order on the iron griddle, the diced steak is seared outside and juicy within, the teppanyaki beef is fragrant with onion and black pepper, and the squid is springy and sweet. The stir-fried cabbage is light and the signature corn soup is rich and creamy. Dessert is a choice of three, with pan-fried banana drizzled in condensed milk a classic pick. Crispy garlic chips and pepper salt come on the side. Credit cards and Apple Pay accepted. A great pick for an affordable, high-value teppanyaki lunch or dinner.

What I ordered

Teppanyaki Diced Steak Teppanyaki Beef with Onions Teppanyaki Squid Stir-Fried Cabbage Corn Soup Pan-Fried Banana

Dishes
